self_check.bbox_integrity: valid - all operation coordinates are inside bbox [0..8]x[0..5]x[0..12]. Note: operations use coordinates inclusive; ymax=5 used for slab layer.
self_check.contains_floor_walls_roof_windows_entran: yes - floor/ground plane and planter border, two-row sandstone lower walls, quartz upper band, brick trim, stone slab coping roof, recessed red roof infill, glass window row, centered entrance opening on front short side.
self_check.material_coherence: checked - distinct materials assigned: sandstone for lower walls, glass for windows, quartz for upper band, brick for trim, stone_slab for coping, red_concrete for roof infill, white_concrete for planter. No role collapsing.
self_check.structural_faithfulness: improved - footprint 7x10 interior walls within bbox approximating 9x13 external hint with planter. Floor layering and roof recess implemented. Window row centered and continuous. Door opening centered on short facade with 2-block height.
self_check.notes: Adjusted footprint to fit bbox (external dimensions x:0-8 -> width 9, z:0-12 -> depth 13). Used interior fill coordinates to create visible 4-window spans on long facades. Entrance placed at x=4,z=0 centered. All ops count <= 260.
